dog: Dogs require daily exercise like walks to prevent obesity and behavioral issues. Puppies need more frequent feeding. Regular grooming prevents matting. Vaccinations and vet checkups are essential.
cat: Cats are independent but need daily interaction. Provide litter box maintenance. Indoor cats need playtime to prevent boredom. Regular vet visits for vaccinations and dental care.
bird: Birds need a clean cage daily. Provide fresh food and water. Social interaction prevents loneliness. Feather plucking can indicate stress.
rabbit: Rabbits need hay daily. Provide space to hop. Check for overgrown teeth. Socialize to prevent aggression.
fish: Change water weekly. Feed appropriate amount. Monitor for diseases. Provide hiding spots.
hamster: Hamsters are nocturnal. Provide wheel for exercise. Clean cage weekly. Handle gently to avoid stress.
